pageSubtitle: Under five minutes to your first answer: ready to ship, or not.
welcomeSubtitle: Before shipping anything built with AI…
noCodeChanges: No code changes will be made.
githubRequired: GitHub access is required to review your repository.
createWorkspaceHint: One quick step before your first Production Verdict.
connectGitHubBody: SequrAI reviews your repositories and produces a Production Verdict.
scopesDetail: SequrAI requests read access to your repositories and webhook permissions to review code on push. SequrAI never modifies your code or deploys your application.
chooseProjectSubtitle: Select one repository for your first Production Verdict.
projectResolveFailed: Repository connected but project could not be resolved.
noReposBody: Create or connect a GitHub repository to receive your first Production Verdict.
fastestPathSubtitle: Resolve these three priorities for the fastest route to production.
fastestPathEmpty: No production blockers detected. Your application looks close to production readiness.
engineerSubtitle: A senior production engineer perspective on your repository.
dashboardReadyTitle: Your first Production Verdict is ready.
dashboardReadyBody: SequrAI will continue reviewing your application as it evolves.
blockersIntro_one: Your latest review introduced {count} Production Blocker.
blockersIntro_other: Your latest review introduced {count} Production Blockers.
